## Problem statement
What user problem or opportunity are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution
Describe your idea. Feel free to attach wireframes, flowcharts, or references.

## Alternatives considered
List any other options you explored.

## Additional context
Anything else reviewers should know (related issues, links, timelines, etc.).
